title: Castle Lite
description: Optimization mods with a few new blocks
body:
## Castle Lite
A lightweight fabric modpack with various performance mods. Perfect for a vanilla-like medieval fantasy playthrough.

### Content mods
- Handcrafted: Tables, chairs, and much more!
- Supplementaries: A lot of trinkets and new decorations
- Farmer's delight: New placeable foods, and some cooking utensils

### Visual mods
- Customizable elytra
- 3d Skin layers
- Iris shaders with complementary reimagined
